creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 228964
Screenshot: <http://localhost:631/> Control-P

Is this still an issue? 

I have    70-yes-bitmaps.conf    and (amongst other things) 
the print dialogue for <http://localhost:631/> appears fine. 

----

% pkg info -x firefox
firefox-93.0_2,2
% file /usr/local/etc/fonts/conf.d/70-yes-bitmaps.conf
/usr/local/etc/fonts/conf.d/70-yes-bitmaps.conf: symbolic link to ../conf.avail/70-yes-bitmaps.conf
% file /usr/local/etc/fonts/conf.d/70-no-bitmaps.conf
/usr/local/etc/fonts/conf.d/70-no-bitmaps.conf: cannot open `/usr/local/etc/fonts/conf.d/70-no-bitmaps.conf' (No such file or directory)
% ls -hl /usr/local/etc/fonts/conf.d/
